title: Software
text:
I develop open-source software in R related to robust statistics and semiparametric regression models.

rplam-vs: An R package for robust estimation and simultaneous variable selection in partially linear additive models.
rmargint: An R package with the classical and robust marginal integration procedures for estimating the additive components in an additive model.

title: Resources
text:
My research focuses on robust statistics, semiparametric models, variable selection, and statistical learning.




G. Boente y A. Martı́nez. Robust variable selection for partially linear additive models. Statistics and Computing, 34, 201. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10520-7.


G. Boente y A. Martı́nez. A robust spline approach in partially linear additive models. Compu- tational Statistics and Data Analysis, 178, 107611. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.csda.2022.107611.


Martı́nez, A. M. y Salibian−Barrera, M.”RBF: An R package to compute a robust backfitting estimator for additive models”. Journal of Open Source Software, 6(60), 2992. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.02992.


G. Boente, A. Martı́nez y M. Salibian–Barrera. Robust estimators for additive models using backfitting. Journal of Nonparametric Statistics, 29, 744-767.


G. Boente y A. Martı́nez. Marginal integration M −estimators for additive models. TEST, 26, 231-260.


G. Boente y A. Martı́nez. Estimating additive models with missing responses. Communications in Statistics: Theory and Methods, 45, 413-429.







Martı́nez, A. M. “Addressing Robustenss and Sparsity in Partially Linear Additive Models”. Capítulo del libro: New Trends in Functional Statistics and Related Fields, Springer. Proceedings of The International Workshop on Functional and Operatorial Statistics (IWFOS), Italy. Chapter 44, pp. 365-374. ISBN 978-3-031-92383-8. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-92383-8.







C. Duna y A. M. Martı́nez. “Estudio de los errores en la resolución de inecuaciones en alumnos ingresantes al Profesorado de Matemática”. En: Actas de las VIII jornadas de educación matemática y V jornadas de investigación en educación matemática: miradas y desafı́os de la educación matemática en el siglo XXI, 1ra edición especial. Santa Fe: Universidad Nacional del Litoral. ISBN: 978-987-692- 416-0.

2018 A. M. Martı́nez y N. Murrone. “Comparación de propuestas para el análisis de componentes principales en matrices con datos faltantes”. En: Anales de LatinR 2018, Conferencia Latinoamericana sobre Uso de R en Investigación + Desarrollo. Editado por 47JAIIO. ISBN: 2618-3196

G. Boente, A. Martı́nez y M. Salibián Barrera. “Robust estimators in additive models with miss- ing responses”. En: II ISNPS (International Society of Non Parametric Statistics) Book of abstracts. Editado por Universidad Carlos III & The International Society for Non-Parametric Statistics. ISBN: 978-84-89315-69-3.







Martı́nez, A. M. “A robust estimation and variable selection approach for sparse partially linear additive models”. http://arxiv.org/abs/2502.13126.


Boente, G. y Martı́nez, A. M. “Robust variable selection for partially linear additive models”. https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.10869.


Boente, G. y Martı́nez, A. M. “A robust spline approach in partially linear additive models”. https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.12987.


Boente, G. y Martı́nez, A. M. “Marginal integration M-estimators for additive models”. https: //arxiv.org/pdf/1509.04334.

title: Teaching
text: I teach undergraduate and graduate courses in probability, statistics, and mathematics at the National University of Luján.

title: Research
text: My research interests include robust estimation, semiparametric regression models and variable selection.

title: Alejandra Martínez
text:
Alejandra Martínez
Assistant Professor Department of Basic Sciences National University of Luján
Researcher at CONICET
Argentina

My research focuses on robust statistics, semiparametric models and variable selection.
Welcome to my academic website. Here you will find information about my research, teaching, software, and freely available educational resources.
